sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n15519" key="a)rri/ghtos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀρρῑ´γ-ητος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n15519.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">not shivering, daring,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">AP</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">6.219</biblScope> </bibl> (Antip.).</sense> </entryFree>
